text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: CANOpenRobotController CANOpenRobotController

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: YAML configuration files used by the different robot platforms to dynamically load some important parameters. config

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Markdown main documentation. After using Doxigen you can also access the Doxygen documentation in html/index.html. doc

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: ROS and ROS2 launch files if using a ROS/ROS2 stateMachine. launch

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: External libraries used (and compiled) by CORC. Some are installed as git submodules. lib

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: ROS and ROS2 msg files if using a ROS stateMachine. msg

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Set of useful scripts to initiate CAN or virtual CAN interfaces, upload files to BeagleBone or create a new state machine (app). script

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Source files organised in three levels: 1)apps: contains application code (examples) and is where you can define your main logic; 2) hardware: contains platform (robot) and IO drivers to be modified/added to if you use non-supported hardware or new hardware functionalities; 3)core: with core CORC logic, likely not to be modified. src

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: All the demo/example apps provided with CORC. Each app is a dedicated StateMachine with its own states. See the Get started pages for details. Your custom apps can also be placed in a different, external folder, for easier maintenance. apps

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: The very basic app example to start with to test CORC, the compilation process... ExoTestMachine

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: The EMU (M3) state machine example. M3DemoMachine

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: A template used by the createStateMachine script to ease the creation of a new custom StateMachine (app). StateMachineTemplate

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: other examples are available, check the Get started pages. ...

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Core code defining the main logic and common functionalities used by all CORC. Should very likely not be modified. core

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: The low-level CANOpen stack. Should very likely not be modified. CANopen

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Convenience classes to manage network communication via FLNL. Should very likely not be modified. network

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: The base robot and joint classes. Should very likely not be modified. robot

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: The core/base StateMachine classes. Should very likely not be modified. stateMachine

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: All the different hardware drivers and interaction code, including the various supported robots definition, motor drives and other IOs. hardware

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Motor drives classes. Include dedicated classes for Copley, Kinco and EPOS CANOpen based motor drives. drives

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Drivers for various IOs (IMUs, encoders, keyboard...). See dedicated document page on supported IOs. IO

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Classes for each supported platform (robot) and their respective Joints where appropriate. Add or modify only if you need a new platform or new platform functionality (e.g. new sensor...). platforms

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Classes for the FIT-HV waist exoskeleton (ULS robotics). FITHVExo

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Classes for an example logging robot: only logging state. LoggingRobot

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Classes for the ArmMotus M1 (Fourier Intelligence). M1

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Classes for the ArmMotus M2 (Fourier Intelligence). M2

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Classes for the ArmMotus M2 Pro (Fourier Intelligence). M2P

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;

svg.text: Classes for the ArmMotus EMU (Fourier Intelligence). M3

text.style: font: 13px 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; fill: #0b3d91;
